Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Extends provisions of law relating to capital facilities in support of the state university and community colleges, procurement and the state university health care facilities
Summary: Extends provisions of law relating to capital facilities in support of the state university and community colleges, procurement and the state university health care facilities.
LawCode: Amd Part D Subpart A §4, Subpart B §4, Subpart C §3, Chap 58 of 2011
ActClause: AN ACT to amend part D of chapter 58 of the laws of 2011 amending the education law relating to capital facilities in support of the state university and community colleges, procurement and the state university health care facilities, in relation to the effectiveness thereof
